what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for a design-source image asset named capital-raise/p-17; it stores the asset's id, channel address, path, content-addressed blob URI, MIME type, dimensions, source label, author session, creation timestamp, and an empty links list, plus a one-line source note.
observations: MIME type is 'image/jpeg' but width and height are both 0
Trailing line reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — capital-raise/p-17.jpg'
standouts: Width and height are recorded as 0 for an image/jpeg asset
A content-addressed blob hash is provided
concerns: Zero width and height may indicate missing image dimension extraction or a placeholder value
No descriptive caption or visual content summary is present
No links or relationships are recorded for the asset
notes: Minimal metadata stub for a design-source JPEG in the capital-raise deck, notable for its content-addressed blob and unresolved zero dimensions.
questions: Why are the image width and height both 0?
What visual content does capital-raise/p-17.jpg contain?

purpose_vs_actual: Stated as a design ground-truth source record; it does record the asset metadata and blob pointer, but the zero dimensions suggest the image metadata extraction is incomplete.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register a design-source image from a capital-raise document as a traceable, content-addressed artifact in the channel-memory ledger.
novelty: The explicit 'SOURCE design ground-truth' provenance label paired with a content-addressed blob URI, while simultaneously recording zero image dimensions.
contribution: Provides a stable identifier, channel path, and content-addressed blob pointer for a design-source image asset, supporting later retrieval, provenance tracing, and fusion by blob or path.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata record for a design-source JPEG image named capital-raise/p-17, including its content-addressed blob URI, source label, author session, creation timestamp, and zero-width/height dimensions.
intention_for_embedding: To register a design ground-truth image asset from a capital-raise deck into the channel-memory ledger for provenance and retrieval.
